<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-iū]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:Tên-yû]][[ja:丁酉]][[ko:정유 (간지)]][[nds:Füür-Hahn]][[vi:Đinh Dậu]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-iú]][[zh-yue:丁酉]][[zh:丁酉]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-iū]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:Tên-yû]][[ja:丁酉]][[ko:정유 (간지)]][[nds:Füür-Hahn]][[vi:Đinh Dậu]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-iú]][[zh-yue:丁酉]][[zh:丁酉]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-iū]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:Tên-yû]][[ja:丁酉]][[ko:정유 (간지)]][[nds:Füür-Hahn]][[vi:Đinh Dậu]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-iú]][[zh-yue:丁酉]][[zh:丁酉]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=丁酉|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiyū|p=dīyǒu|w=ting-yu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=tɛŋ jɐu|mc=tæŋ jɨu|oc-bs=tæŋ jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 34th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Fire Monkey]] and followed by [[Yang Earth Dog]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Rooster (丁酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: teiyū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongyu (정유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Dậu

<!--
==
* Yin Fire Rooster (丁酉) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 jau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのととり (hinoto-tori)
***Onyomi: ていかのとり (teika-no-tori)
***Onyomi: ていゆう (teiyū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongyu
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Dậu

-->
==Years of Yin Fire Rooster==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 37 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Fire Rooster]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Rooster (丁酉)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 37|37 AD]]
* [[AD 97|97 AD]]
* [[157|157 AD]]
* [[217|217 AD]]
* [[277|277 AD]]
* [[337|337 AD]]
* [[397|397 AD]]
* [[457|457 AD]]
* [[517|517 AD]]
* [[577|577 AD]]
* [[637|637 AD]]
* [[697|697 AD]]
* [[AD 757|757 AD]]
* [[817|817 AD]]
* [[877|877 AD]]
* [[937|937 AD]]
* [[997|997 AD]]
|
* [[1057|1057 AD]]
* [[1117|1117 AD]]
* [[1177|1177 AD]]
* [[1237|1237 AD]]
* [[1297|1297 AD]]
* [[1357|1357 AD]]
* [[1417|1417 AD]]
* [[1477|1477 AD]]
* [[1537|1537 AD]]
* [[1597|1597 AD]]
* [[1657|1657 AD]]
* [[1717|1717 AD]]
* [[1777|1777 AD]]
* [[1837|1837 AD]]
* [[1897|1897 AD]]
* [[1957|1957 AD]]
|
* [[2017|2017 AD]]
* [[2077 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2137 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2197 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2257 AD]]
* [[24th century|2317 AD]]
* [[2377 AD]]
* [[2437 AD]]
* [[2497 AD]]
* [[2557 AD]]
* [[2617 AD]]
* [[2677 AD]]
* [[2737 AD]]
* [[2797 AD]]
* [[2857 AD]]
* [[2917 AD]]
* [[2977 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In [[Keichō]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the [[Imjin War]] took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion."
* In [[Tenmon]] 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by [[Keitetsu Genso]] was named "Itou" (酊) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Rooster==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoto (辛)]] and [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[August]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Fire Rooster]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rooster==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Fire Rooster]] is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of [[Yin Fire Rooster]] is the 5th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]]
[[zh-yue:乙丑]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Rooster|qq=ja|丁酉|version=84123810|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Büffelvi]]
[[de:Yin Fire Rooster]]

[[ja:丁酉]]
[[zh:丁酉]]
[[ko:정유 (간지)]]
[[fr:Coq de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Hahn]]

[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Büffelen]]
[[en:Metal Ox]]
[[fr:Buffle de métalboishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:을축]]
[[vi:Ất Sửu]]
[[za:Yitceij]]
[[zh:乙丑]]
[[ar:Yin Fire Rooster]]

<!--Yin Fire Rooster--><!--Yin Fire Rooster-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-iū]]
[[hak:Tên-yû]]
[[nds:Füür-Hahn]]
[[vi:Đinh Dậu]]
[[za:Dingyoux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-iú]]
[[zh-yue:丁酉]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-iū]]
[[hak:Tên-yû]]
[[nds:Füür-Hahn]]
[[vi:Đinh Dậu]]
[[za:Dingyoux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-iú]]
[[zh-yue:丁酉]]
{{wikidata link|Q201551}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
